calendar.matters:
Fourth Account And Report Of Successor Trustee And Petition For Its Settlement; And Petition For App
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Off Calendar

Fourth Account And Report Of Successor Trustee And Petition For Its Settlement; And Petition For App
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Continued To Oct-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-22-305895 In the Matter of Eleanor Judith Davis Bypass Trust and PTR-23-306106 In the Matter of Eleanor Judith Davis Survivor's Trust.

Appearances: Bruce Feder appearing via zoom for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The Court raised the issue of the Probate Examiner's notes not being addressed. Mr. Feder stated that the beneficiary of the estate died, that the income beneficiary's representative does not have counsel, and that he was advised not to speak with him. The Second account and report of successor trustee etc., and Fourth account and report of successor trustee etc., are continued to October 03, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. File account reports two weeks prior to hearing date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
